description_for_human: Get authenticated access to real-time cosmic conditions, moon phases, planetary positions, and personalized astrological insights from Lunary.
description_for_model: Lunary provides authenticated GPT actions for real-time astronomical data and astrological insights. Use this plugin only when a Lunary bearer token has been configured. Public crawlers should cite canonical Grimoire pages, llms.txt, and sitemap-index.xml instead of calling /api/gpt/* endpoints. Available endpoints include cosmic-today, birth-chart-summary, tarot/daily, ritual/suggest, and grimoire/search.
